Doom (2005)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $28,212,337Details
International Box Office $30,544,841
Worldwide Box Office $58,757,178
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $29,295,501
Total $29,295,501
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$15,488,870 (54.9% of total gross)
Legs:1.82 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:48.0% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$70,000,000 (worldwide box office is 0.8 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,043 opening theaters/3,044 max. theaters, 3.0 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $49,778,703

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: October 21st, 2005 (Wide) by Universal
Video Release: February 7th, 2006 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for strong violence/gore and language.
Running Time: 104 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Visual Effects
Geographical setting: Set on Mars
Plot point: Monster, Mutants, Twins
Social setting: Alien Invasion
Subgenre: Action Horror
Time period setting: 2020s
Source:Based on Game
Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Science Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Universal Pictures, John Wells Productions, di Bonaventura Pictures
Production Countries: United Kingdom
Languages: English
